name: OpenAI Text-to-Speech API
what_it_does: OpenAI's text-to-speech API — converts text to natural speech with 6 built-in voices (Alloy, Echo, Fable, etc.) and streaming support, using the same API key as GPT.
use_cases: Adding voice output to ChatGPT-style agent interfaces
Converting agent responses to audio for accessibility or voice UI
Streaming TTS for real-time voice agent conversations (gpt-4o-realtime)
Generating audio for content creation (narration, audiobooks)
Multi-modal agent output combining text and speech
not_for: Voice cloning or custom voice creation (use ElevenLabs for custom voices)
Languages beyond the ~57 supported (ElevenLabs has broader language support)
best_when: You're already using OpenAI APIs and need simple, high-quality TTS with minimal setup — same API key, excellent Python SDK, clean integration.
avoid_when: You need custom voice cloning, ultra-low latency, or very high request volumes where per-character costs matter significantly.

auth.notes: Same API key as all other OpenAI APIs. Optionally scoped to organization. No TTS-specific permissions — key has full API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — pay per character
pricing.notes: Straightforward per-character pricing. TTS-1 is faster and cheaper; TTS-1-HD is higher quality. gpt-4o-audio is separate pricing.

performance.rate_limits: 1,500 RPM on Tier 1; increases with usage tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard OpenAI error format with type and message fields. Rate limit errors include retry-after headers. Consistent with OpenAI API conventions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: TTS is deterministic for same text+voice+speed+model inputs. Safe to retry without side effects.
known_agent_gotchas: 4096 character input limit per request — agents must chunk longer texts
Response is raw binary audio — no JSON wrapper; content-type is audio/mpeg
Voice selection is from 6 fixed options — no custom voices unlike ElevenLabs
No word-level timestamps — if you need timing, use Whisper separately
Streaming writes audio chunks incrementally — proper streaming client handling required

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Same security posture as OpenAI Chat API (SOC 2 Type II). API key management via OpenAI dashboard. Organization-level keys supported. Audio data not retained after processing.
